comments.text: Observer Pattern. - One to many notification: It supports a one to many dependency. When the Course changes state, all registered dependents (Student on the waiting list) are immediately notifed. - Loose Coupling: The Course object does not need to know details of who the students are or how to contact the,. It only triggers a notification event. - Flexibility and Extensibility: New types of observers(EmailNotifier, SMSNotifier) can be added without changing the Course logic - The Course announce the availability without managaing or knowing its dependents -> This is excatly what Observer pattern archieves
